text:
Once upon an orange moon, in a small moon-library cosy.

My favourite book was Moonfields haunted by moles.

I'd snewl lots.

One day.

No I mean moons. My nose bleed.

My nose bleed. What a thing!

But ah.

Then.

I read moon pies.

Fried moon custards!

So full.

I knew.

You bake mochez!










I snore.

My dream.

You're mine.

Do moles love cookies?

No moles there?


Moth loves cookies.

My moth loves moches.

You think?

Oh.

Then eat moches.

I sleep.

You dream!

Such big stars!


My fav.

Dream catcher.

Catch spiders. Nice.
